chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Customs Reference Application 1545 of 2023 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of main case 2. For hearing of CMA No.3910/2023 18.09.2025 Mr. Faisal Siddiqui, advocate for the applicant Mr. Ali Tahir, advocate for respondent The following questions of law were framed for determination:- A. Whether the Learned Appellate Tribunal has erred by holding that the subject goods i.e. "Esomeprazole Pellets"/ "Esomeprazole Magnessium Ec" were not entitled to the concessionary duty under SRO No. 567/2006, dated: 5th June, 2006, without considering that the said SRO No. 567/2006, had been amended by the SRO No. 574(I)/2012, dated: 1st June, 2012, through which the item i.e. "Esomeprazole Magnessium Ec" had been granted 5% concessionary custom duty? B. Whether the subject goods i.e. "Esomeprazole Pellets"/ "Esomeprazole Magnessium Ec" imported by the Applicant are entitled to 5% concessionary custom duty under SRO No. 567/2006, amended by the SRO No. 574(I)/2012? It is jointly stated that the issue ought to have been determined by the learned tribunal being the last forum for adjudicating facts. In view hereof, it is jointly submitted that the impugned judgment may be set aside and the matter may be remanded to the tribunal for adjudication afresh. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969.

Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge B-K Soomro
